topic: Microsoft Agent Framework 2026: AutoGen Successor Explained

competitors.title: AutoGen to Microsoft Agent Framework Migration Guide | Microsoft Learn
key_points: Microsoft Agent Framework is the successor to AutoGen for building multi-agent systems
Comprehensive migration guide covers mapping from AutoGen to Agent Framework features
Includes support for Responses API (Agent Framework exclusive feature)
Supports MCP server integration and hosted tools
Offers middleware capabilities not available in AutoGen
Workflow patterns replace AutoGen's group chat patterns

competitors.title: AI Agent Frameworks Complete Guide 2026: LangGraph vs AutoGen vs CrewAI
key_points: Leading AI agent frameworks in 2026 include LangGraph, AutoGen, and CrewAI
Microsoft Agent Framework positioned as AutoGen successor with enterprise features
Framework comparisons examine architecture, strengths, limitations, and ideal use cases
Migration patterns from older frameworks to newer Microsoft offerings emphasized

competitors.title: CrewAI vs AutoGen vs LangGraph: AI Agent Frameworks Compared in 2026
key_points: Three dominant frameworks in 2026: CrewAI (role-based), AutoGen (conversational), LangGraph (stateful workflow graphs)
Architecture differences: CrewAI focuses on role-based multi-agent orchestration
AutoGen uses conversational agent framework (Microsoft's approach)
LangGraph provides stateful agent workflow graphs from LangChain
